name: molmo-realworld-cleanup
summary: Drive the household cleanup task through public household-world and manipulation capabilities.

mcp.boundary_notes: Public/private-safe household surface. No scene_objects, target list, hidden destination table, source-map mutation, or private scoring truth.

capability_requirements.notes: intent=cleanup composes world evidence, manipulation, and task lifecycle; intent=map-build should require household_world without manipulation.

scripts.summary: Reference wrapper for the canonical observed-object cleanup routine. It composes public atomic MCP tools through an injected call_tool function and preserves semantic substeps.
Non-authoritative run-local strategy scratchpad helpers for intent, retries, and routine summaries.

refactor_signals: repeated cleanup traces reveal reusable room-sweep or object-selection behavior
planner-backed manipulation evidence becomes common enough to split into a subskill
promote_to_mcp_when: a subproblem is stable across cleanup skills
it uses only public contract data
trace and report artifacts preserve the semantic substeps
live performance evidence shows skill-side composition is not good enough for cross-client use
